summary: research drift also fetches /v1/get_optimized_documents and unions the titles with the writer-doc titles before classifying gaps.
reason: The command's short/long descriptions promise coverage against both writer and optimized documents, but the implementation only called get_writer_documents. Any topic covered exclusively by a Content Optimizer article was misclassified as a gap, inflating the gap list for any user who relies on the optimizer for content. The optimizer fetch is lenient: a project without the optimizer add-on still produces a valid result via writer docs alone.
